candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total for current assets; directly matches ACT definition.

candidates.row_label: Change in current assets and liabilities
candidates.why: Cash-flow working-capital change line, not a balance-sheet stock measure.
Non-current assets, opposite of ACT.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current assets line from the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Cash-related but restricted; usually excluded from cash and cash equivalents.
Exact balance-sheet line matching CHE.
Component of cash, not the total cash and cash equivalents balance.

candidates.row_label: Bank balances and cash on hand
candidates.why: Could be a cash total in some periods, but the cleaner explicit line is available.

candidates.row_label: Investment in subsidiaries net of cash acquired
candidates.why: Investing flow, unrelated to CHE stock variable.

candidates.row_label: Changes in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Flow, not ending cash stock.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the year
candidates.why: Cash-flow reconciliation line, not preferred over balance-sheet stock.

candidates.row_label: Effects of exchange rate fluctuations on cash held
candidates.why: Adjustment line, not CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Could reconcile to CHE, but balance-sheet line is preferred.
Unrelated.

variables.notes: Used the explicit balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.why: Potential current-liabilities total, but preview shows blanks and a clearer total line exists.
Exact balance-sheet total for current liabilities; best match for LCT.
Non-current liabilities, not LCT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Current maturities of secured bank loans
candidates.why: Current portion of bank debt; valid STD component.

candidates.row_label: Bank overdraft and short term borrowings
candidates.why: Short-term financing debt; valid STD component.
Supplemental current portion of long-term debt; overlaps with current maturities of secured bank loans and risks double counting.
Cash-flow change line, not balance-sheet debt stock.

final_choice.row_label: Current maturities of secured bank loans
Bank overdraft and short term borrowings

variables.notes: Used the minimal non-lease current debt components from the balance sheet. Did not use 'LT Debt Within 1 Year' to avoid double counting with current maturities.

candidates.why: Exact current tax payable liability line; matches TXP.

variables.notes: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Not property, plant and equipment.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-related asset component, not total PPE and baseline PPE preference excludes using a lease-specific component when total PPE exists.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Accumulated depreciation component, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Total Indefinite-lived Intangible Assets (excl Goodwill) - Net - Supplemental
candidates.why: Intangible assets, not PPE.
Cash-flow capex line for intangibles, not balance-sheet PPE.

variables.notes: R:nc. Chose a confident balance-sheet label outside the shortlist because it is the explicit reported PPE total/net line and better matches PPEGT than any candidate. | Auto-flag: best candidate confidence 0.20 < 0.65

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total assets line; direct match for AT.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Intermediate subtotal before working-capital changes; not net operating cash flow.
Exact net cash provided by operating activities; best match for OANCF.

variables.notes: Selected the net operating cash flow line rather than the pre-working-capital subtotal.
